title: Is it possible to create dynamic dashboard and share it with client?
excerpt:
Hi. 
is it possible to create dynamic dashboard and share it with client? 
I don’t want the client to see the data in the connected dashboard. 
this is what im trying to achieve - How to Create Quarterly Report for Clien…

posts.author: eranggg (eran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.

is it possible to create dynamic dashboard and share it with client?
I don’t want the client to see the data in the connected dashboard.

this is what im trying to achieve - How to Create Quarterly Report for Clients the right way? - #7 by eranggg

posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi eran,

Sharing dashboards with clients is a great way to grant visibility and gain trust. To your question: yes, you can share dynamic dashboards with clients without sharing the data connected to it. On the dashboard view, click the three dot buttom and select “Share view”.

image207×313 10.8 KB

You’ll get a window with the links to share or embed the dashboard on another website.

image512×352 24 KB

I hope this works for you but if you need further assistance, don’t hesitate to ask.

posts.author: eranggg (eran)
posts.cookedHtml: you talk about boards I talk about dashboards

posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml: I see. It seems like dashboards aren’t sharebale outside of your account. You can read more about dashboards here.
